title: Our Companies
note: Describes Southern Company's customer base, electric utilities, natural gas distribution utilities, wholesale energy, distributed energy, fiber, and wireless operations.

title: Southern Company 2025 Annual Report
note: Primary annual-report source for Southern Company's 2025 regulated utility, wholesale power, gas, capital investment, and financial disclosures.

title: The Southern Company (SO) Stock Price & Overview
note: Market-data source for May 2026 market capitalization and trailing financial snapshot.

title: The Southern Company (SO) Financial Ratios
note: Market-data source for Southern Company's May 2026 PE ratio snapshot.

title: About OpenADR
note: Explains OpenADR as an open, secure, two-way communication model for automated demand response and distributed energy resource management.

title: OpenEMS - Open Source Energy Management System
note: Documents OpenEMS as a modular open-source platform for energy management, storage, renewables, EV charging, tariffs, and related local energy devices.

title: Building Energy Modeling
note: Describes EnergyPlus and OpenStudio as open-source building energy modeling tools used for design, retrofit, operations, policy, and large-scale analysis.

title: NREL OpenStudio
note: Source repository for the OpenStudio cross-platform open-source building energy modeling toolset.

title: Open Source Documentation
note: Documents open solar hardware designs released under CERN-OHL-S, relevant to open energy hardware, repair, and local reuse concepts.
